topic: Technical Specification Documentation Best Practices — Comprehensive Analysis and Template Evaluation
content_preview: Synthesizes best practices from IEEE, ISO, INCOSE, modern software frameworks (RFCs, ADRs, BDD), hardware standards (ASME, IPC), and leading tech companies (Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Tesla, SpaceX, Boston Dynamics) to evaluate a specification template. Identifies 8 critical gaps (executive summary, requirements language, RTM, NFR structure, testing, risks, version control, ADRs) and proposes an 18-section hierarchical template structure with 5-phase implementation roadmap. Compares against Google Design Doc, AWS RFC, IEEE 29148, SpaceX HIL, and Boston Dynamics API-first approaches. Key insight: 'just barely good enough' documentation that provides maximum value without becoming a burden.
